description: Machine-readable index of every module in the Themes Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.

how_to_navigate.step_1: Read agent_glossary below — do not confuse Default theme vs app fixture vs status Active.
how_to_navigate.step_2: Use concern_lookup to jump to the right files for your task.
how_to_navigate.step_3: In large files, grep AGENT: (e.g. grep 'AGENT:restore' frontend/src/pages/ThemeSettingsPage.vue).
how_to_navigate.step_4: Run tests without bench: python3 -m unittest discover -s themes/tests -p 'test_*.py'

emit_theme_bg_css_classes.summary: Generate theme-bg-* utility classes and --nce-* vars for downstream apps
files: themes/utils/css_publish.py — write_published_css() writes file + hash + cache bust
themes/public/css/nce_theme.css — GENERATED; must match current emitter (grep theme-bg- count)

neutral_warmth_greyscale.summary: Neutral role: warmth slider → resolved shade map at save time

restore_to_app_fixture.summary: Restore to Base Theme: save current edits, load data/base_theme.json into editor (unsaved)
restore_to_app_fixture.not_the_same_as: Loading the live Default theme from DB (that is get_base_theme_editor / get_theme_editor)

save_default_to_app_repo.summary: System tab: password-gated bundle of current Default into git + republish CSS
save_default_to_app_repo.after_running: Commit and push themes/data/base_theme.json and themes/public/css/nce_theme.css if regenerated

theme_swatch_picker_desk.summary: Desk colour picker widget for panel chrome class strings

editor_load_save_dirty.summary: Shared SPA editor state machine for Web + Desk settings pages

token_tables_single_source.summary: Role/shade/map constants — Python is source, TS is generated

deploy_stale_css_trap.summary: nce_theme.css in git must be regenerated after emitter changes or pulls serve stale class names
deploy_stale_css_trap.symptom: grep -c theme-bg- on served CSS returns 0 → transparent panel fills
deploy_stale_css_trap.fix: bench execute themes.api.regenerate_theme_css; verify theme-bg- count > 0; commit updated css if tracked

file_anchors.ThemeSettingsPage.vue: grep 'AGENT:' — tabs (AGENT:TAB), payload, restore, save-default, useThemeEditor
file_anchors.theme_color_utils.py: OKLCH math — keep in sync with color-shades.ts

themes.purpose: Frappe custom app for site-wide CSS theming (Web tokens → --nce-*) and Frappe Desk chrome theming (Desk tokens → native --*-color)

entry_points.hooks.py: Frappe app metadata, CSS/JS loading (nce_theme.css + nce_desk_theme.css + theme-swatch-picker), SPA routing, Apps screen entry, after_install
entry_points.api.py: Thin whitelisted wrappers — delegates to theme_service with WEB_FAMILY / DESK_FAMILY. Grep AGENT: for sections.
entry_points.utils/theme_family.py: ThemeFamily frozen descriptors: WEB_FAMILY, DESK_FAMILY (doctype, parse/publish/bundle, is_active semantics, single_active flag).
entry_points.utils/theme_service.py: Family-parameterized CRUD: get_editor_response, get_restore_base_payload, save, create, set_base, save_as_base, list_themes, rename, delete, regenerate_css.
entry_points.utils/theme_tokens.py: Single source of truth for token tables (ROLES, CURATED_SHADES, maps). export_token_contract() → frontend domain/theme-tokens.ts
entry_points.utils/css_publish.py: Shared publish tail: write_published_css(filename, css) → hash file + cache bust
entry_points.install.py: after_install hook: Site Theme Config + NCE Theme Default + NCE Desk Theme Default on fresh install
entry_points.init_theme.py: One-time init script: ensure NCE Theme Default exists and publish Web CSS. Run via bench execute.
entry_points.init_desk_theme.py: One-time init script: ensure NCE Desk Theme Default exists and publish Desk CSS. Run via bench execute.
entry_points.verify_fresh_install.py: Post-install verification script for theme + desk theme bootstrap
entry_points.patches/v1_0/migrate_theme_settings_to_n: Post-migrate patch: legacy Theme Settings → NCE Theme Default
entry_points.patches/v1_0/collapse_theme_versions_to_: Copy legacy Theme Version JSON onto NCE Theme.theme_json
entry_points.patches/v1_0/remove_legacy_theme_doctype: Drop Theme Version and Theme Settings from database
entry_points.patches/v1_0/add_base_desk_theme_field.p: Add base_desk_theme to Site Theme Config
entry_points.patches/v1_0/bootstrap_default_desk_them: Bootstrap NCE Desk Theme Default on migrate
entry_points.patches/v1_0/resolve_neutral_color_shade: Backfill neutral_color + neutral_color_shades on saved themes

utils.utils/theme_color_utils.py: Color math helpers: OKLCH shade generation, neutral warmth, _effective_role_hex, shadow building. Keep in sync with frontend/src/utils/color-shades.ts
utils.utils/css_writer.py: Web CSS generation and publish: generate_css(), generate_site_css(), publish_theme(). Emits theme-bg-* classes. Paired with desk_css_writer.py.
utils.utils/desk_css_writer.py: Desk CSS generation and publish: generate_desk_css(), publish_desk_theme(), DESK_TOKEN_FIELDS. Paired with css_writer.py.
utils.utils/bundle_base_theme.py: bundle_base_theme_to_app() — write base_theme.json + default_theme.py for new installs
utils.utils/bundle_base_desk_theme.py: bundle_base_desk_theme_to_app() — write base_desk_theme.json + default_desk_theme.py for new installs
utils.utils/site_theme_config_helpers.py: Read/write Site Theme Config base_theme and base_desk_theme (includes legacy active_theme tolerance)
utils.utils/workspace_sync.py: Sync Themes workspace shortcuts after install/migrate
utils.data/base_theme.json: App fixture — git-shipped Web default for new installs and Restore to Base Theme. Updated by Save Default to app.
utils.data/base_desk_theme.json: App fixture — git-shipped Desk default. Updated by save_as_base_desk_theme.
utils.utils/default_theme.py: load_bundled_base_theme_payload() — reads base_theme.json with embedded fallback
utils.utils/default_desk_theme.py: Default Desk token payload loader for new NCE Desk Theme installs

doctypes.themes/doctype/nce_theme/: Web theme registry: theme_name, slug, is_default, status, theme_json. on_update republishes when Active or site Default.
doctypes.themes/doctype/nce_desk_theme/: Desk theme registry: same shape as NCE Theme; single Active enforced at save time.
doctypes.themes/doctype/site_theme_config/: Single: base_theme, base_desk_theme, css_hash; on_update publishes Web CSS.

static_files.public/css/nce_theme.css: GENERATED Web theme CSS (theme-bg-* classes + :root vars). Tracked in git — regenerate after emitter changes. Sidecar .hash for hooks cache-busting.
static_files.public/frontend/: Vue SPA build output (regenerated by Vite)

pages.themes/page/site_theme_switch/: Desk Page redirect → Site Theme Config form

tests.tests/test_css_snapshots.py: Golden-file regression tests for generate_css / generate_site_css / desk CSS output
tests.tests/test_api_contract.py: Response shape tests for editor endpoints and legacy alias keys
tests.tests/test_color_math_parity.py: Python side of color-math parity vs frontend color-shades.ts
tests.tests/golden/: Committed golden CSS + hash sidecars and color_math_parity.json

frontend.purpose: Vue 3 SPA for Web and Desk theme configuration and preview

key_files.src/router.ts: Vue Router config — maps /themes/* paths to page components
key_files.src/domain/theme-tokens.ts: GENERATED token contract from theme_tokens.py — do not hand-edit

pages.src/pages/ThemeSettingsPage.vue: Web theme editor (~1750 lines). Grep AGENT: / AGENT:TAB for sections. Uses useThemeEditor composable.
pages.src/pages/DeskThemeSettingsPage.vue: Desk chrome theme editor — uses useThemeEditor; grep AGENT: if present

composables.src/composables/useTheme.ts: Loads site Default Web theme via get_active_theme_editor (legacy alias)
composables.src/composables/useThemeEditor.ts: Shared editor state/resources for Web + Desk settings pages (load, dirty, save, list CRUD)
composables.src/composables/useDeskTheme.ts: Loads Active Desk theme and applies Desk CSS vars
composables.src/composables/useThemeDefaults.ts: Default theme color/typography values for editor seeding

components.src/components/BrandColorPicker.vue: Primary/Secondary picker with gamma/saturation + shade strip
components.src/components/EditorSection.vue: Collapsible section wrapper for editor tabs
components.src/components/PasswordField.vue: Password input with show/hide eye (System tab)
components.src/components/SwatchPicker.vue: Hex color swatch picker for theme editor
components.src/components/ThemeSwatchPicker.vue: Vue wrapper for theme class picker — pass :set-field/:get-field for form persistence

widget.src/widget/constants.ts: Roles, kinds, curated shades — import from domain/theme-tokens.ts where possible
widget.src/widget/theme-swatch-picker-core.ts: Framework-agnostic modal DOM core (open/close); probes theme-bg-primary-500 on load
widget.src/widget/blocked-dialog.ts: User-facing msgprint when Theme missing or Inactive
widget.src/widget/adapters/desk-adapter.ts: Frappe Desk frm integration — resolveNceThemeSlug, frm.set_value on pick

utilities.src/utils/color-shades.ts: OKLCH shade generation (11-stop scale) — keep in sync with theme_color_utils.py
utilities.tailwind.config.js: Maps Tailwind utilities to --nce-* CSS tokens (editor SPA internal build only)

nce_events.desk: Page Panel form — Colours tab calls frappe.ui.themeSwatchPicker.open for chrome slots (frame, header, footer, col_header, filter_bar, row, row_alt, dialog_header)
nce_events.runtime: panel_page_v2 — panelChromeClasses.js applies theme-bg-* on PanelFloat, PanelTable, PanelTableFilterBar, PanelFormDialog
nce_events.class_prefix: Consumers use theme-bg-{role}-{shade} — NOT bare bg-{role}-{shade}. Served nce_theme.css must contain theme-bg-* rules.

agent_glossary.READ_FIRST: Agents: use this glossary. Do NOT confuse these terms.
agent_glossary.Default_theme: The one NCE Theme / NCE Desk Theme record with is_default=1 and theme_name='Default'. ALWAYS the site :root fallback. Users never promote another theme to replace Default.
agent_glossary.is_default_theme: API boolean: true only on the Default theme record. CANONICAL — use this in new code.
agent_glossary.is_base_theme: DEPRECATED API alias for is_default_theme. Same value. Do not use in new code or docs.
agent_glossary.status_Active: Theme is published for consumers: web → included as [data-nce-theme=slug] block; desk → live desk chrome. Multiple web themes can be Active; desk allows only one Active.
agent_glossary.is_active: DEPRECATED. Web: wrongly aliased is_default_theme historically. Desk: means status==Active. Prefer status or is_default_theme.
agent_glossary.app_fixture: themes/data/base_theme.json and base_desk_theme.json — git-shipped JSON for new installs and Restore to Base Theme. NOT the live Default DB row. Updated by Save Default to app (System tab).
agent_glossary.Site_Theme_Config_base_theme: Internal DB link used by CSS publish for :root. Should always point at Default.

architecture_notes: Web theme: Default → :root --nce-* vars; each status=Active theme → [data-nce-theme=slug] scoped block. See agent_glossary.
Desk theme uses native Frappe Desk CSS variables (--primary-color, --bg-color, etc.) emitted to :root from nce_desk_theme.css
Web and Desk CSS loaded site-wide via app_include_css in hooks.py (nce_theme.css + nce_desk_theme.css)
API: themes/utils/theme_service.py is the implementation; api.py is thin wrappers only
Vue SPA is served at /themes/* routes via www/themes.html
ThemeSwatchPicker: themeField Link → slug; classes are theme-bg-* with auto-paired fg

Refactoring status: Stages 1–3 largely done (theme_family, theme_service, theme_tokens, css_publish, useThemeEditor, tests). Stage 4 (retire legacy endpoints) pending caller audit. God-component split deferred — use AGENT: markers instead.
plans/REFACTORING_PLAN.md — full staged plan; tests in themes/tests/ are the safety net before further consolidation
